extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon soloed to Stage 7 victory with a brave attack and descent, while KWIATKOWSKI Michał secured overall despite missing time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: KWIATKOWSKI Michał failed to contest sprint bonuses despite close GC margin, revealing yellow jersey passivity cost him cushion.
PINOT Thibaut attacked for bonus seconds at finish despite no GC threat, showing FDJ prioritizes stage placings.
PREIDLER Georg paced PINOT Thibaut in final, inadvertently helping KWIATKOWSKI Michał by raising pace against breakaway.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: executed successful solo attack with strong descent to compensate for lost GC opportunity
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: passive tactics allowed 24-second gap and missed bonuses despite needing only 29-second margin over YATES
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: attacked for bonus seconds at finish showing form but no GC impact
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: neutral: assisted KWIATKOWSKI indirectly by chasing in final meters
rider_signals.BENNETT George: neutral: finished ahead of KWIATKOWSKI in sprint, showing positioning awareness for minor GC gains
